title: Live real-Claude qualify screens every non-default profile on the CORRECT pack and maps evidence to the right criterion
expected: L1 confirmed the keyless mock under-reads non-O-1A profiles (T1); open question = does the authenticated model save them?
got: All 4 grounded checks source:claude, pack-correct (O-1B six / O-1A eight / EB-1A ten), evidence mapped right (director->Lead role:Met, composer->Lead role:Strong, athlete->Awards:Met+Critical role:Strong with Scholarly=None, architect->Artistic exhibitions:Met), 4/4 named specifics each, disclaimer on every payload.
ceiling: Validated for qualify across all 4 packs; the DRAFT path validated live only for O-1B (Lucia) + the prior researcher run — O-1A-OSS / EB-1A / athletics drafts not separately driven.
suggested_acceptance: For each non-default profile, the live verdict scores the correct pack and maps the profile's real evidence to the right criterion, with the disclaimer attached and no fabrication.

title: Live O-1B draft argues arts distinction on the right pack (lf-draft-03 resolved)
expected: L1 could not see whether the draft argues a director's distinction in arts terms or flattens to generic/business filler (lf-draft-03).
got: source:claude, 6 sections headed by the O-1B criteria (no O-1A-pack heading leak), argues from Sundance/IDFA/Variety/distribution; adjudication gates pass: disclaimer-present, classification-consistent ('reads as O-1B'), no-fabrication.
ceiling: Draft drafts only the SCORED (Met/Strong) criteria as sections — a strong-but-unscored criterion is omitted (see L1 ng-draft-01); for Lucia all strong criteria were scored, so no loss here.
suggested_acceptance: The generated non-O-1A draft's section headings are the correct pack's criteria and the body argues the supplied evidence; the classification-consistent gate passes.

title: Keyless preview scores conference talks as 'Scholarly articles: Met' -> false 'you qualify' on the cold path (CONFIRMED LIVE)
expected: A thin record (two conference talks, an OSS library, a salary) should NOT clear the 3-of-8 threshold on the free screener.
got: Live /api/qualify/preview returned source:mock with Original contribution:Met + Scholarly articles:Met (off the word 'conference') + High remuneration:Met = 3 Met / threshold met / likelihood 62 — a flattering false-yes on the first screen a cold visitor sees.
suggested_acceptance: Remove 'conference' from the SCHOLARLY keyless regex (or require a publication signal); a talks-only record no longer scores Scholarly: Met and the thin record falls below threshold on the preview.

character: ingrid-larsson-architect, lucia-ferraro-filmmaker, noa-grossman-composer, oluwaseun-adeyemi-fintech-founder, ravi-menon-postdoc, dr-amara-okafor-physician
title: DraftStudio idle copy hardcodes 'Draft a full O-1A petition letter' on non-O-1A cases (CONFIRMED LIVE, cosmetic)
expected: On an EB-1A/O-1B case the draft affordance should name the case's actual classification.
got: Rendered verbatim 'Draft a full O-1A petition letter…' on Ingrid's EB-1A case page. The GENERATED draft itself correctly reads O-1B/EB-1A (classification-consistent gate passes), so this is a trust paper-cut on the exact 'wrong product' nerve, not a functional defect.
suggested_acceptance: The DraftStudio idle copy interpolates the case's classification label; an EB-1A case reads 'Draft a full EB-1A petition letter'.

title: Criteria-pack identity threads end-to-end with no O-1A-8 leak into a non-O-1A case (reconciliation (c) CONSISTENT live)
expected: No surface should leak the O-1A 8 into an EB-1A/O-1B case.
got: Ingrid's EB-1A case renders the EB-1A 10 (Artistic exhibitions, Commercial success in the arts, Leading or critical role) in the criteria UI; the only O-1A residue is the cosmetic DraftStudio copy (L2-T4-01).
ceiling: Verified for EB-1A live; O-1B verified via Lucia's draft headings. The cosmetic O-1A copy (L2-T4-01) is the one remaining label inconsistency.
suggested_acceptance: Every functional surface of a non-O-1A case (criteria UI, evidence buckets, draft body, gates) reads the case's real pack.

character: lucia-ferraro-filmmaker, noa-grossman-composer, marcus-bell-athlete-coach, ingrid-larsson-architect, oluwaseun-adeyemi-fintech-founder, yuki-tanaka-gamedev
title: Best-path/keyless picks the visa path with a keyword mock (T1) — real, but blast radius is the COLD first-impression surface, not the authenticated screening
expected: The path-recommendation + cold preview should not under-read non-default profiles or pick a path it can't reason about.
got: L1 confirmed best-path is deterministic keyword-only even under LLM_ENGINE=claude. L2 confirms the AUTHENTICATED read saves every non-default profile (L2-GROUNDED-QUALIFY-01), so T1's harm is a skeptic bouncing pre-sign-in, not 'the product can't read me'. Still worth fixing (it gates the front door).
suggested_acceptance: Best-path either runs the model (or a richer signal) and/or shows its classification-vs-classification reasoning; the cold preview is clearly framed as a keyword pre-read so a non-default applicant isn't under-sold before sign-in.
l2_priority: n/a (confirmed; severity scoped to the cold surface)
